title: cirsium × sennenii
intro: Cirsium × sennenii is a hybrid plant species in the family Asteraceae, resulting from the cross between Cirsium japonicum and Cirsium pannonicum. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × sennenii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
